items.title: The US Government Will Ask Data Centers How Much Power They Use
items.summary: In a letter obtained by WIRED, the Energy Information Administration tells two senators that it plans to develop a mandatory assessment of data centers' energy use.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Motorola sues social platforms and creators over posts, raising speech concerns in India
items.summary: Motorola is suing dozens of content creators and social media platforms including Instagram, X, and YouTube over posts it alleges are defamatory.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.
